title: message_query accepts chat_id=Some("") past validation
description: Trigger: caller passes MessageQueryInput { chat_id: Some(""), .. } to message_query. The validation at line 249 only checks chat_id.is_none(); an empty string passes the check. The request is built with "filter": {"chatId": ""} and sent to the server. No server will have messages matching chatId:""; depending on the server, this either returns an empty result set or a JMAP error — but the client-side guard never fires and no InvalidArgument error is returned to the caller.
